name: 123pan-upload
description: Upload files to 123pan and generate shareable links with privacy-friendly short links. Supports API upload (<10GB), WebDAV, and rclone for large files.

env.name: PAN123_DIRECT_FOLDER_ID
env.description: Target folder ID with direct link enabled

env.name: RCLONE_BIN
env.description: Path to rclone binary (defaults to system PATH or ~/.openclaw/rclone-v1.73.2-linux-amd64/rclone)

env.name: RCLONE_CONFIG
env.description: Path to dedicated rclone config file (recommended for isolation, avoids reading ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf)

warnings: WebDAV scripts may read ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf. Use RCLONE_CONFIG env var to specify isolated config.
Large file uploads involve long-running API polling (may take minutes).
WebDAV credentials are sensitive - use environment variables, not config files.

suggested_isolation.rclone_config: Create dedicated rclone config: rclone config --config ~/123pan-rclone.conf

file.description: Path to the file to upload

short-link.description: Return short share link instead of direct link (default: true)

link.description: The shareable link (short or direct based on options)
